frameworks.name: evidence accumulation / deliberation
frameworks.one_line: value-based choice reflects accumulation of internal evidence over time

frameworks.name: hippocampal prospection and relational cognition
frameworks.one_line: hippocampus is recruited to construct value evidence during deliberation

frameworks.name: perceptual decision-making
frameworks.one_line: contrasted with value-based decisions to isolate hippocampal contribution

core_question: Does the hippocampus support deliberation during value-based decisions?
key_assumptions: choices between similar-value options require more evidence
deliberation time indexes internal evidence accumulation
hippocampus contributes to prospection and relational cognition
manipulations: group: hippocampal-damaged patients vs healthy controls
key_findings: hippocampal BOLD increased with deliberation time in healthy fMRI participants
patients with hippocampal damage showed more stochastic choices
hippocampal patients had longer reaction times than controls
effects were stronger for value-based than perceptual decisions
interpretations: hippocampus supports deliberation by constructing value-based internal evidence
hippocampal damage impairs evidence construction selectively for value choices
